title: [SRE] MongoDB Atlas System Metrics
description: Meta-dashboard monitoring the health of 'MongoDB Atlas System Metrics'

panels.title: Datasource API
panels.description: Probe engine queries the target datasource or proxy directly with Prometheus GET /api/v1/query. This turns red when the direct datasource path returns errors or no usable data.

panels.title: Grafana Panel Path
panels.description: Probe engine asks Grafana /api/ds/query to run the panel query through Grafana's datasource plugin path. This catches user-facing panel failures even when the direct datasource query is healthy.

panels.title: Variable Dependency
panels.description: Probe engine maps failed dashboard variables back to panels that reference them. This turns red when a panel is user-blocked by variable interpolation even though underlying data queries may be healthy.
